meta.claiming_protocol: Orchestrator liest diese Datei, findet ersten Task mit status=open in seinem Stream ohne offene blocked_by-EintrГѓЖ’Г†вЂ™ГѓвЂљГ‚ВЇГѓЖ’Гўв‚¬ЕЎГѓвЂљГ‚ВїГѓЖ’Гўв‚¬ЕЎГѓвЂљГ‚ВЅge, setzt status=in_progress + claimed_by + claimed_at. Commit atomar via git.

STREAM-INFRA.name: Infrastruktur & DevOps
STREAM-INFRA.description: Monorepo, Docker Compose, CI/CD, Terraform, Staging-Deployment

STREAM-DB.name: Datenbankschema & Clients
STREAM-DB.description: PostgreSQL-Schema (alle Tabellen), Alembic, Weaviate-Collection, Neo4j-Constraints, DB-Verbindungsclients, Health-Check

STREAM-MODELS.name: Datenmodelle & App-Skeleton
STREAM-MODELS.description: Pydantic v2-Modelle (UnifiedDocument, Chunk, Entity, Briefing, SearchResult, Connection), SQLAlchemy-ORM, FastAPI-App-Skeleton

STREAM-CONNECTORS.name: Daten-Konnektoren
STREAM-CONNECTORS.description: BaseConnector ABC, ConnectorRegistry, OAuth Token Manager, Normalizer-Basis, 4 MVP-Konnektoren (Google Calendar, Notion, Obsidian, Zoom)

STREAM-PROCESSING.name: Verarbeitungs-Pipeline & Suche & Briefing
STREAM-PROCESSING.description: Chunking, Embedding, NER, Graph Builder, LLM Gateway, Search-Service, Briefing-Engine

STREAM-AUTH-API.name: Auth & FastAPI-Routen
STREAM-AUTH-API.description: JWT (RS256), Argon2, OAuth2 Google Login, Token-Rotation, Rate-Limiting, alle API-Endpunkte

STREAM-FRONTEND.name: Next.js Frontend
STREAM-FRONTEND.description: App-Router-Grundstruktur, API-Client-Abstraktion, alle Seiten (Login, Dashboard, Briefing, Suche, Konnektoren, Knowledge Explorer, Profil), Auth-Context, WebSocket, Barrierefreiheit

STREAM-DSGVO-QA.name: DSGVO, Testing & Monitoring
STREAM-DSGVO-QA.description: Datenexport, kaskadierende LГѓЖ’Г†вЂ™ГѓвЂљГ‚ВЇГѓЖ’Гўв‚¬ЕЎГѓвЂљГ‚ВїГѓЖ’Гўв‚¬ЕЎГѓвЂљГ‚ВЅschung, Audit-Log, VerschlГѓЖ’Г†вЂ™ГѓвЂљГ‚ВЇГѓЖ’Гўв‚¬ЕЎГѓвЂљГ‚ВїГѓЖ’Гўв‚¬ЕЎГѓвЂљГ‚ВЅsselungs-UI, pytest-Setup, Unit/Integration/E2E/Load-Tests, Logging, Sentry, Metriken, OpenAPI-Doku

STREAM-PHASE3.name: Phase 3: Queue-Migration & neue Konnektoren
STREAM-PHASE3.description: Celery + Redis, Queue-Worker-Migration, Gmail, Slack, Google Docs, Outlook-Konnektoren

STREAM-PHASE4.name: Phase 4: Intelligenz & Desktop
STREAM-PHASE4.description: EntscheidungsunterstГѓЖ’Г†вЂ™ГѓвЂљГ‚ВЇГѓЖ’Гўв‚¬ЕЎГѓвЂљГ‚ВїГѓЖ’Гўв‚¬ЕЎГѓвЂљГ‚ВЅtzung, aktive Erinnerungen, Projektbriefings, Lernmodell, Desktop-App (Tauri), erweiterte NER, Mustererkennung, Browser-Extension, Slack-Bot, Notion-Sidebar, Weekly Briefings, Pricing/Billing

STREAM-PHASE5.name: Phase 5: Platform & Skalierung
STREAM-PHASE5.description: Multi-Tenancy, Self-Hosting, horizontale Skalierung, Sicherheitsaudit, Public Beta, B2B-Features, ГѓЖ’Г†вЂ™ГѓвЂљГ‚ВЇГѓЖ’Гўв‚¬ЕЎГѓвЂљГ‚ВїГѓЖ’Гўв‚¬ЕЎГѓвЂљГ‚ВЅffentliche API, Marketplace, Mobile Apps, RBAC, Spezialisierungen, Langzeit-Intelligenz
